name: Wacky Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: Liquid sugar substitute, equal to 1/2 cup sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt in a mixer bowl and mix on low speed to blend.
2. Beat together remaining ingredients with a fork to blend. Add all at once to dry ingredients and beat until smooth.
3. Paper-line 12 muffin tins or grease with margarine and flour. Fill muffin tins about 1/2 full.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean from the center of the cupcake.
5. Serve 1 cupcake per serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 158; CHO: 17gm; PRO: 2gm; FAT: 10gm
